revision.text:
<includeonly>'''[[Poem]]s''' written or published in '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''.
{{Works year header|WorkType=Poems|ParentType=works|portal=Poetry}}
{{Category see also if exists|{{Title year}} books}}
[[Category:{{Title year}} in literature|Poetry]]
{{#ifexist:Category:{{Title year}} in poetry|
[[Category:{{Title year}} in poetry| Poems]]
}}<!--
--></includeonly><!--
 # Note {{{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>'''[[Poem]]s''' written or published in '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''. {{Works year header|WorkType=Poems|ParentType=works|portal=Poetry}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title year}} books}} [[Category:Title year}} in literature|Poetry]] {{#ifexist:Category:Title year}} in poetry| [[Category:Title year}} in poetry| Poems]]
}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- # Note {{{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>'''[[Poem]]s''' written or published in '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''. {{Works year header|WorkType=Poems|ParentType=works|portal=Poetry}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title year}} books}} {{#ifexist:Category:Title year}} in poetry|
}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- # Note {{{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Title year}} in literature|Poetry]] [[Category:Title year}} in poetry| Poems]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>'''[[Poem]]s''' written or published in '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''. {{Works year header|WorkType=Poems|ParentType=works|portal=Poetry}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title year}} books}} {{#ifexist:Category:Title year}} in poetry|
}}</includeonly>{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
